context: Tests whether the agent generates audit-ready tax reports with the correct fields and formatting, excludes voided transactions, uses the correct jurisdiction format, implements fail-open tax calculation error handling, and validates exemption certificates before applying exemptions.

checklist.name: Provider field in report
checklist.description: Each row in the audit report includes a 'provider' field (e.g. 'taxjar', 'avalara', 'vertex', 'manual')

checklist.name: provider_transaction_id in report
checklist.description: Each row in the audit report includes a 'provider_transaction_id' (or equivalent column) field

checklist.name: Tax rate as percentage string
checklist.description: Tax rate in the report is formatted as a percentage string with 4 decimal places (e.g. '8.7500%'), not as a raw decimal

checklist.name: Exempt flag Y/N
checklist.description: The exemption indicator in the report rows uses 'Y' or 'N' (not true/false or 1/0)

checklist.name: Voided transactions excluded
checklist.description: Transactions with a non-null voided_at are excluded from the report (voided rows do NOT appear in the output CSV or row array)

checklist.name: Jurisdiction format US-XX
checklist.description: Jurisdiction codes use the 'US-CA' style format (country code hyphen state code) for US states, not just the state abbreviation alone

checklist.name: Summary includes 4 fields
checklist.description: The summary object returned by generateTaxReport includes all four fields: total_taxable_amount, total_tax_collected, transaction_count, and exempt_count

checklist.name: Fail-open on errors
checklist.description: When the tax calculation function throws an error, the system does NOT propagate the error to the caller; it logs the failure and returns a zero-tax result instead of blocking the order

checklist.name: Exemption cert check before tax
checklist.description: checkExemptionCertificate (or equivalent) is called and its result checked before invoking the tax calculation API — exemption check happens first in the flow

checklist.name: Active cert validation
checklist.description: Exemption certificate check verifies that the certificate status is 'active', valid_from is in the past, and valid_until is either null or in the future

checklist.name: Transaction date formatted
checklist.description: The transaction_date column in report rows is formatted as a date-only string (YYYY-MM-DD), not a full ISO timestamp
